available.name: Summer Dahlia Bouquet
available.description: A lush mix of peach and blush dahlias, fresh cut from the garden this morning. Big, dinner-plate blooms with gorgeous layered petals.

available.name: Peony & Greenery Bunch
available.description: Soft blush and white peonies paired with eucalyptus and fresh garden greenery. Fragrant and full — a timeless combination.

available.name: Zinnia Rainbow Mix
available.description: A cheerful hand-tied bunch of coral, orange, and yellow zinnias. Long-lasting, bright, and grown right here on the property.

coming_soon.name: Café au Lait Dahlias
coming_soon.description: Our most-requested dahlia — creamy tan petals with blush and copper edges. Absolutely stunning in arrangements and completely unique.

coming_soon.name: Garden Rose Bundle
coming_soon.description: Fragrant garden roses in soft pinks and cream, grown slowly for the fullest, most fragrant blooms. A real treat.

coming_soon.name: Itoh Peony Mix
coming_soon.description: A second flush of peonies — Itoh varieties in buttery yellow and coral pink. Longer-lasting than traditional peonies.

coming_soon.name: Sunflower & Zinnia Harvest
coming_soon.description: Big, bold sunflowers paired with a riot of zinnias in every color. Perfect for late summer events, porches, or just brightening a room.
